name: Steve and the Duck: Shooter
author: Poki
description: Help Steve and his trusty friend Duck as they fight their way through a zombie-infested dungeon! In this action shooting game, it's up to you to clear each floor of all the undead and find the key to the exit. During your search, you can find chests containing gold and precious diamonds! As you progress through the dungeon, you can use the diamonds to increase Steve's attributes - such as his health or his walking speed - and use the gold to buy new guns, which you can merge into even bigger guns! Stuck in a difficult part? Don't worry - you can always get some power-ups to help you through! Can you escape the dungeon with Steve and the Duck? How to play Steve and the Duck: Shooter? Use the WASD buttons, the arrows keys or touch to move and shoot! Who created Steve and the Duck: Shooter? Steve and the Duck: Shooter was created by Sakkat Studio. Play their other games on Poki: It's Story Time! , Ground Digger and Crush It! How can I play Steve and the Duck: Shooter for free? You can play Steve and the Duck: Shooter for free on Poki. Can I play Steve and the Duck: Shooter on mobile devices and desktop? Steve and the Duck: Shooter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
